quotes.verbatim_quote:
The main goal of this course is to introduce you to the different elements of
playing jazz guitar, presented over a ii V | progression.

These elements include:

Chord Shapes

Chord Rhythms

Picking Patterns
Chromatic Chords

Major Scales

Chromatic Ornaments
Mixing Chords and Scales
And more.
quotes.why_load_bearing: This passage defines the full curriculum scope of the method — chord shapes, rhythms, picking patterns, chromatic chords, major scales, ornaments, and their integration — establishing the conceptual map students will follow.

quotes.verbatim_quote:
Watch the video lesson as you follow along with the PDF.
Go back to the beginning and re-watch the first chapter.
Work on chapter 1 in the PDF until it’s comfortable.
Move on and watch the chapter 2 video.

Work on chapter 2 in the PDF until it’s comfortable.
Repeat for each chapter.
quotes.why_load_bearing: This gives the explicit practice protocol — watch, review, drill to comfort, then advance — which is the method's rule for pacing through material.
